command.text: select char(255) as n01, char(255) as n02, char(255) as n03, char(255) as n04, char(255) as n05, char(255) as n06, char(255) as n07, char(255) as n08, char(255) as n09, char(255) as n10, char(255) as n11, char(255) as n12, char(255) as n13, char(255) as n14, char(255) as n15, char(255) as n16, char(255) as n17, char(255) as n18, char(255) as n19, char(255) as n20, char(255) as n21, char(255) as n22, char(255) as n23, char(255) as n24, char(255) as n25, char(255) as n26, char(255) as n27, char(255) as n28, char(255) as n29, char(255) as n30, char(255) as n31, rtrim(b.ma_nv) ma_nv, rtrim(b.ho_nv) + space(1) + rtrim(b.ten_nv) ho_ten, rtrim(b.bo_phan) ma_bp, rtrim(b.vi_tri) ma_vt, case @@language when 'v' then c.ten_bp else c.ten_bp2 end ten_bp%l, case @@language when 'v' then d.ten_vtr else d.ten_vtr2 end ten_vt%l from @@table a left join hrnv b on a.stt_rec_nv = b.stt_rec left join hrbp c on b.bo_phan = c.ma_bp left join hrvt d on b.vi_tri = d.ma_vtr where a.stt_rec_nv = @stt_rec_nv return

declare @q nvarchar(4000), @d nvarchar(4000), @s nvarchar(4000), @f nvarchar(4000), @k nvarchar(32), @i int select @d = '', @s = '', @f = '', @k = '', @i = 1 while @i < 32 begin select @k = case when @i > 9 then rtrim(@i) else '0' + rtrim(@i) end select @d = @d + 'isnull(n' + @k + ', '''')+', @s = @s + replace('n%f = @n%f, ', '%f', @k), @f = @f + '@n' + @k + ' varchar(32),' select @i = @i + 1 end
select @d = substring(rtrim(@d), 0, len(@d)), @s = substring(rtrim(@s), 0, len(@s)), @f = substring(rtrim(@f), 0, len(@f)) select @q = 'update ' + @$partition + ' set ' + replace(@s, '''', '''''') + ' where stt_rec_nv = ''' + replace(@stt_rec_nv, '''', '''''') + '''' execute sp_executesql @q, @f, @n01, @n02, @n03, @n04, @n05, @n06, @n07, @n08, @n09, @n10, @n11, @n12, @n13, @n14, @n15, @n16, @n17, @n18, @n19, @n20, @n21, @n22, @n23, @n24, @n25, @n26, @n27, @n28, @n29, @n30, @n31 /*

*/ select @q = 'update ' + @$partition + ' set status = case when (rtrim(' + @d + ')) <> '''' then ''1'' else ''0'' end where stt_rec_nv = ''' + replace(@stt_rec_nv, '''', '') + '''' exec sp_executesql @q
select @q = 'update ' + @$partition + ' set datetime0 = getdate(), datetime2 = getdate(), user_id0 = @@userID, user_id2 = @@userID' select @q = @q + ' where stt_rec_nv = ''' + replace(@stt_rec_nv, '''', '''''') + '''' exec sp_executesql @q

action.text: declare @q nvarchar(4000), @i int, @c varchar(2) select @q = 'select rtrim(n01) as n01', @i = 2 while @i <= 31 begin select @c = replace(str(@i, 2), ' ', '0') select @q = @q + ', rtrim(n' + @c + ') as n' + @c, @i = @i + 1 end select @q = @q + ' from hrca$' + @p + ' where (stt_rec_nv = ''' + replace(@s, '''', '') + ''')' exec sp_executesql @q
